Clifford"), [Sidney Schreiber](/wiki/Sidney_Schreiber "Sidney Schreiber"), [Alan B. Handler](/wiki/Alan_B._Handler "Alan B. Handler"), [Stewart G. Pollock](/wiki/Stewart_G._Pollock "Stewart G. ***New Jersey Board of Higher Education v. Shelton College***, 90 N.J. 470 (1982), 448 A.2d 988, is a [New Jersey Supreme Court](/wiki/New_Jersey_Supreme_Court "New Jersey Supreme Court") case regarding state regulation of religious schools which grant academic degrees.[[1]](#cite_note-1) The Court held that religious schools are prohibited from granting degrees without a state license.
